basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) has officially announced the Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. IIMR/Admn/Rec./Jr.Accounts Executive/2026-27/09. Candidates aged up to 35 years and holding B.Com and M.Com with first-class marks from a recognized University or Institute can submit their online applications on or before 19 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Com and M. Com with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute.
qualification.details: Junior Accounts Executive: B. Com and M. Com with first-class marks from a recognised University or Institute.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6 (Basic Pay of Rs. 35,400/- per month plus Dearness Allowance).

selection_process: Personal Interview Written Test Skill Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Raipur Junior Accounts Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Accounts Executive post at IIM Raipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the Junior Accounts Executive position at IIM Raipur is 19th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Accounts Executive role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. Com and M. Com degree with first-class marks from a recognized University or Institute to be eligible for the Junior Accounts Executive post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Accounts Executive post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Accounts Executive position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive consolidated emoluments equivalent to the minimum of Pay Level 6, which includes a basic pay of Rs. 35,400/- per month plus Dearness Allowance.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Accounts Executive post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Accounts Executive post at IIM Raipur through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Accounts Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Accounts Executive recruitment at IIM Raipur will involve a Written Test, Skill Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Junior Accounts Executive position at IIM Raipur is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIM Raipur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Management Raipur is www.iimraipur.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Accounts Executive position at IIM Raipur is contractual.
